title: AutoRestartPlus
description: A lightweight and intelligent auto-restart plugin that keeps your Minecraft server stable and lag-free. It automatically restarts the server every set interval but smartly checks if any players are online — delaying the restart until everyone leaves.
body: AutoRestartPlus ensures smooth performance and uptime by automatically restarting your Paper or Spigot server at custom time intervals. The plugin only triggers when no players are online, avoiding disruptions during gameplay. It supports configurable messages, delay timers, and console commands — all while remaining ultra-lightweight, making it ideal for optimized and low-resource setups.
